timeSyncThresholdSec: Time sync only above drift of X seconds
configInfo: Multi-device configuration and discovery actions will be added in the next development steps.
discoveryInfo: Use the discovery button to identify SIKU masters via UDP broadcast and merge them into the device table. Existing names, passwords and enabled flags are preserved.
discoveryUpdated: Discovery updated the device list. Please save the configuration.
discoveryUnchanged: Discovery found devices, but the configuration did not change.
discoveryNoDevices: Discovery did not find any reachable SIKU master devices.
timeSyncInfo: The adapter does not read RTC values during normal polling. Instead it performs a dedicated time check every 24 hours and only syncs clocks with a drift above the configured threshold.
timeCheckSynced: At least one device clock was corrected.
timeCheckNoSyncNeeded: All configured device clocks are already within the allowed threshold.
timeCheckCompletedWithErrors: The time check finished, but at least one device could not be reached.
timeCheckBusy: A time check is already running. Please try again in a moment.
timeCheckNoDevices: No configured devices are available for a time check.
